title: Kicked Pendulum
description: Explore a periodically kicked pendulum and its stroboscopic phase space, revealing the transition between regular islands and chaotic seas as the kick strength rises.
interactive_controls: New Trajectory: start a fresh path
Clear: reset all phase space paths
Mode selector: driven strobe vs reference no-drive
Kick Strength slider: controls kick impulse per cycle
Kick Period slider: time between kicks
Enable Damping toggle: turns dissipation on or off
Damping slider: controls energy loss rate
